title: GoalSpec
description: Declarative specification for a BDI goal in WellProdSim. Goals are loaded at runtime from YAML files in the goals/ directory without recompilation.

id.description: Unique snake_case identifier for this goal. Must be stable across versions.

version.description: Semantic version (MAJOR.MINOR). Increment MINOR for compatible changes, MAJOR for breaking changes to activation_when or effects.

display_name.description: Human-readable name in Spanish for UI display and logging.

description.description: Full description of what this goal represents and when it is pursued.

pyramid_level.description: Level in the DesireHierarchyPyramid. Maps to GoalBDITypes enum: SURVIVAL > DUTY > OPPORTUNITY > NEED > ATTENTION_CYCLE.

sub_level.description: Fine-grained sub-level within pyramid_level for documentation and filtering.

activation_when.description: MVEL2 boolean expression evaluated against a context variable 'belief' (BeliefRepository). Returns true when the goal should be detected. Example: "belief.get('money') <= 500000 && !belief.get('haveLoan')".

plan_ref.description: ID of the PlanSpec to execute when this goal is selected as intention. Must match a file in plans/{plan_ref}.yaml.

normative_tags.description: Tags referencing normative rules (e.g. 'law_0_community', 'law_1_family'). Used by NormativeFilter in GoalEngine (stub until normative module is implemented).

ContributionRules.description: Fuzzy logic rules for computing how much this goal contributes to agent well-being [0,1].

fixed_value.description: If set, contribution is always this constant value (skips fuzzy evaluation). Use for simple goals like DoVitals.

fuzzy_inputs.description: Belief values fed as fuzzy input variables. Required when rules use fuzzy terms.

rules.description: FCL-style fuzzy rules. Use 'default' rule as fallback.

name.description: Variable name used in fuzzy rules (e.g. 'hope', 'health').

source.description: Dot-path to belief value. Examples: 'emotional.hopeful', 'health', 'money'. Resolved via BeliefRepository.get().

range.description: [min, max] numeric range for this fuzzy variable.

if.description: Antecedent in natural FCL form. Omit for default rule. Example: "hope IS HIGH and health IS GOOD".

then.description: Consequent. Example: "contribution IS HIGH". For numeric output: "contribution IS 0.8".

default.description: Set true to mark as the fallback rule (no antecedent required).

resources.description: Resources consumed when this goal executes. Keys are belief keys (e.g. 'seeds', 'time_minutes'). Values are minimum quantities required.

skills.description: Skill identifiers the agent must have. Checked against 'skills' belief key.

items.description: Belief mutation. Use 'set', 'increment', or 'decrement' with 'key' and 'value'.
Emotional axis delta. Key is axis name (hopeful, happiness, security), value is float delta.

text.description: Episode text template. Use {belief.key} interpolation for dynamic values.
